# 50 m altitude floor enforced in executor

`VER-altitude-floor`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| verification | draft |

Inspect Executor._goto_waypoint: the line `alt = max(alt, 50)` must be present before any MAVLink waypoint command is issued. Also verify that _loiter and _fly_waypoints do NOT contain this floor.

**Method:** inspection · **scope:** [CMP-executor](../../system/CMP-mission-computer/CMP-executor/README.md) · **latest outcome:** passed
